posts.author: Cshar
posts.community: Wockhardt - A story with twist and turn
posts.text: Fast closing in 2500, best strategy for this stock is to lock in shares and dont look now, we may form any estimations and those might be correct to an extent, i am betting on future NCE potential from wockhardt apart from current 5 NCE portfolio. They might get into CDMO space as well as R&D capabilities are strong and proven. Cohance also has very strong R&D capabilities.

posts.author: parkhi_nazar
posts.community: Wockhardt - A story with twist and turn
posts.text: A great outcome for Wockhardt. Feeling proud about this real innovation happening out of India. As I take stock of the barbell strategy I explained above that I had set in motion a year ago, it feels someone from the heavens has decided to be kind and generous to me. Both sides of the barbell fired! Largish Cash + gold position on one side: Cash has actually been a good bet in the choppy market we’ve been seeing. It also gave me a chance to deploy funds during dips. Gold - do I even need to say anything? Wockhardt on the other side: The USFDA approval has come (congrats to Wockhardt!), and the…

posts.author: jainpatti
posts.community: Wockhardt - A story with twist and turn
posts.text: https://nsearchives.nseindia.com/corporate/WOCKPHARMA_04052026153800_Press_Release_Q4_FY26_combined.pdf As of May 2026, Wockhardt reported a strong Q4 turnaround, with revenue growing 23.8% year-over-year (YoY) to ₹1,156 crore, driven by robust performance. EBITDA increased by 21.9% to ₹140.8 crore, reflecting a significant rebound in profitability for the quarter. Key Quarterly Results Highlights (Based on May 2026 data): Revenue: ₹1,156 crore (23.8% YoY growth). EBITDA: ₹140.8 crore (21.9% YoY increase). Performance Driver: Strong turnaround in operational efficiency.
